channel.title: Architecture to Autonomy
channel.description: Enterprise architecture, API strategy, cloud modernization, and agentic AI systems by Samir Roshan.

item.title: Hardware Is Eating AI: The New Narrative Beyond Software Eating the World
item.description: Marc Andreessen said software would eat the world. It did. But now hardware is eating AI, and AI is eating everything else. What does the projected data tell us about this shift?

item.title: The Agentic Enterprise Needs a New Platform Stack
item.description: Why enterprises need a new architecture foundation for autonomous AI systems.

item.title: Agentic Operating Models for Enterprise Execution
item.description: A practical operating model for ownership, control zones, and measurable outcomes as agentic systems move to production.

item.title: Enterprise API Strategy for Platform Leverage
item.description: A blueprint to treat APIs as products, align domain boundaries, and compound business value through reusable capabilities.

item.title: Cloud Modernization for AI-Ready Enterprise Platforms
item.description: How to modernize cloud platforms by extending virtualization-era strengths with AI-ready controls and runtime patterns.

item.title: Leading from Altitude: Why Strategic Distance Drives Better Decisions
item.description: A leadership perspective on stepping back from daily noise to improve strategic clarity, decision quality, and team resilience.

item.title: From LAMP to LAMP: If It Ain't Broken, Don't Defend It
item.description: A case for modernizing before legacy comfort turns into strategic drag, security exposure, and compounding technical debt.

item.title: Accelerating AI Transformation with VMware
item.description: A field-tested path for moving enterprise AI from pilots to production outcomes with platform discipline and governance.

item.title: The Foundation for Modern Private Cloud: Secure, Autonomous, and AI-Ready
item.description: Why modern private cloud is re-emerging as a core foundation for secure, governed, and autonomous AI-ready enterprise platforms.

item.title: Competitive analysis : A potent tool for understanding market dynamics
item.description: How disciplined competitive analysis sharpens positioning, uncovers market shifts early, and improves strategic execution.

item.title: The platform play: Driving customer experience by creating value
item.description: Why platform strategy compounds customer experience, ecosystem leverage, and long-term differentiation.

item.title: The rising moon: Cost of delayed decisions
item.description: Why delayed enterprise decisions quietly increase cost and risk, and how timely commitment preserves strategic momentum.

item.title: API Economy: Enabling programmable businesses
item.description: How APIs transform capabilities into programmable products, enabling new business models and partnership-led growth.
